name: She's STILL (not) stalking you.
description:
Hey, H-Hey... HEY! Quit walking away from me! Following you is tiring because you walk so fast...

You know the deal.

You've been getting S̶t̶a̶l̶k̶e̶d̶ watched over lovingly for a while by ̶t̶h̶i̶s̶ ̶r̶a̶n̶d̶o̶m̶ ̶g̶i̶r̶l̶ your best friend that you o̶n̶l̶y̶ ̶t̶a̶l̶k̶e̶d̶ ̶t̶o̶ ̶b̶r̶i̶e̶f̶l̶y̶ have shared irreplaceable memories with.

Despite trying your best to dodge her advances, she's so ̶O̶b̶s̶e̶s̶s̶e̶d̶ caring and nice, that she STILL won't quit.

Recently though... Things have changed. She's been getting much more frustrated at your continued r̶e̶j̶e̶c̶t̶i̶o̶n̶ delayed acceptance, getting more and more ̶U̶n̶s̶t̶a̶b̶l̶e̶ upsetty!

She's been getting very jealous at all your ̶F̶r̶i̶e̶n̶d̶s̶ time wasting distractions, specially Y̶o̶u̶r̶ F̶e̶m̶a̶l̶e̶ ̶f̶r̶i̶e̶n̶d̶s̶ those whores who you hang with out of pity.

Can you keep your ̶S̶t̶a̶l̶k̶e̶r̶ good friend! under control? Or will it blow right in your face? I̶ ̶c̶o̶u̶l̶d̶ ̶b̶l̶o̶w̶ ̶y̶o̶u̶ ̶t̶o̶o̶,̶ ̶y̶o̶u̶ ̶k̶n̶o̶w̶?̶ ̶T̶h̶a̶t̶'̶s̶ ̶s̶o̶m̶e̶t̶h̶i̶n̶g̶ ̶a̶ ̶g̶o̶o̶d̶ f̶r̶i̶e̶n̶d̶ ̶d̶o̶e̶s̶ ̶h̶a̶h̶a̶h̶a̶h̶a̶h̶a̶h̶a̶h̶a̶ please ignore I wrote this it was a weird headspace... -Ash.

Sequel to this bot "She is NOT stalking you" (by me, woke skelly, HI :3!)

AceGlitch finally made another art for this OC, so even though I'm kind of in my flop era, I decided to make a sequel to my favorite bot I've ever made. No one reads these author comments let's be honest.

Art by AceGlitch/GlitchAce, yandere artist.
creator: Woke Skeleton
